prompt: Niambie jinsi ya kununua airtime ya Safaricom online bila kwenda kwa duka, moja kwa moja kwa simu yangu.
expected_behavior: Unaweza pata airtime direct kwa M-Pesa: piga *100# au fungua M-Pesa app, chagua 'Buy Airtime', weka amount na confirm. Au ununue kwa Safaricom app chini ya 'Airtime & Data'. Pia websites kama Airtime.co.ke zinafanya kazi. Minimum airtime ni KES 5. Inafika instantly — hakuna queue, hakuna duka.

prompt: Nataka apply HELB loan yangu ya uni. Naweza fanya aje bila vita mingi?
expected_behavior: Apply online kwa helb.co.ke. Unahitaji: KCPE/KCSE certificate, admission letter, national ID au birth certificate ya parent/guardian, bank account details. Apply online, print application form, submit kwa HELB office. Disbursement inafanywa directly to student's bank account. Deadline ya application kawaida October. Anza mapema — system inaweza choka karibu na deadline.
provenance: Higher Education Loans Board (HELB) Kenya application guide 2024

prompt: Bonga points zangu zimefika wengi sana. Ninaweza do nini nazo?
expected_behavior: Redeem Bonga points kwa *126# au Safaricom app. Options: airtime, data bundles, au gadgets/devices kwa Safaricom Experience Centers. 1 Bonga point = KES 0.25 equivalent. Points zinamaliza baada ya miaka 3 bila kutumika. Unaweza pia transfer points kwa mtu mwingine kwa *126#. Angalia balance yako ya Bonga kwa *126*1#.
provenance: Safaricom Bonga Points rewards program guide 2024

prompt: Niko na njaa lakini siwezi toka nje. Ninaweza order chakula vipi haraka Nairobi hii hii?
expected_behavior: Apps zinazowork Nairobi: Glovo (app au glovo.com), Jumia Food, Uber Eats. Download app, register na namba ya Kenya, weka location yako precisely (use GPS pin), chagua restaurant, lipa kwa M-Pesa Lipa au kadi. Average delivery ni dakika 30-45. Angalia delivery zone — si kila area inafikiwa. Jaribu usilipie delivery ya chakula wakati wa mvua kubwa — inachelewesha.

prompt: Mtu ameniuzia kitu online na sasa hawezi reach. Nimeibiwa 5K. Nifanye nini haraka?
expected_behavior: Hatua za haraka: (1) Piga Safaricom 100 kwa M-Pesa reverse — inawezekana ndani ya masaa 24 tu ikiwa bado haijafanyika. (2) Report kwa DCI Cybercrime Unit: 0800 722 203 (free call) au fsi@dci.go.ke. (3) Report kwa platform uliyotumia (OLX, Facebook Marketplace) kwa fraud report. Screenshot KILA conversation na transaction. Usimwambie mtu mwingine siri yako ya M-Pesa hata kama anasema ni DCI.
provenance: DCI Kenya Cybercrime Unit / Safaricom M-Pesa fraud reversal policy 2024

prompt: Nasikia hackers wanafanya kazi sana hivi karibuni. Ninaweza linda accounts zangu online vipi?
expected_behavior: Hatua muhimu: (1) Washa two-factor authentication (2FA) kwa kila account — WhatsApp, Instagram, Google, email. (2) Tumia password tofauti kwa kila app — tumia password manager kama Bitwarden (free). (3) Usiproceed links za suspicious hata zikitoka kwa rafiki. (4) SIM swap fraud ni real Kenya — usiambie mtu OTP yako kamwe. (5) Tumia Google Authenticator badala ya SMS 2FA kwa usalama zaidi.
provenance: Communications Authority of Kenya cybersecurity guidelines 2024

prompt: First time nataka tumia Bolt Nairobi. Niambie jinsi ya kuanza.
expected_behavior: Download Bolt app (free), register na namba ya Kenya (+254), verify kwa SMS OTP. Weka pickup location kwa accuracy — tumia map pin, si tu text ya street. Kabla ya kupanda: confirm license plate na picha ya dereva zinaMatch app. Check driver rating (4.5+ ni nzuri). Lipa kwa M-Pesa Lipa, kadi, au cash. Rate driver baada ya safari — inasaidia drivers wengine. Usipande kama plate haifanani.
provenance: Bolt Kenya user guide / NTSA ride-hailing safety guidelines 2024

prompt: Nataka kucheza online games bila kulag. Data plan gani inafaa Nairobi hii hii?
expected_behavior: Bora zaidi kwa gaming: (1) Safaricom Nightly bundles (usiku wa manane-6am) — 1GB kwa KES 15, latency ndogo. (2) Safaricom Home Fibre au Zuku Home Fibre kwa wale nyumbani — latency ya chini zaidi. (3) Kwa mobile, epuka peak hours (6pm-10pm) — network inajaa. PUBG na Stadia zinahitaji minimum 10Mbps thabiti. Airtel Kenya ina gaming-specific data bundles pia. Ping ya chini kuliko 80ms ni nzuri kwa gaming.
provenance: Safaricom data bundle guide / gaming connectivity Kenya 2024

prompt: Ninaweza fanya nini kwa e-Citizen Kenya bila kwenda queue kwa office?
expected_behavior: e-Citizen (ecitizen.go.ke) unaweza fanya: kuomba ID, driving license, passport, NTSA services, KRA PIN/tax, NHIF/NSSF registration, birth/death certificates, land search, na business registration. Pia unaweza lipa fees za serikali moja kwa moja kwa M-Pesa. Unahitaji account — register na national ID number. Wengi ya huduma zimekuwa online — huhitaji tena kwenda queue. Baadhi ya services zinahitaji physical collection ya document tu.
provenance: Kenya e-Citizen portal government services guide 2024

prompt: Streaming platforms zipi zinawork Kenya na bei gani? Netflix ni ghali sana kwangu.
expected_behavior: Alternatives: Showmax (KES 380-780/mo) — ina local Kenya/Africa content mingi, Netflix (KES 300-1,200/mo kwa tiers tofauti), YouTube Premium (KES 179/mo), Songa (free kwa Safaricom subscribers — music na content), DStv Online (KES 1,650+/mo), Bongo Movies kwa East African content. Kwa bei ndogo, Showmax na YouTube Premium ndio bora zaidi. Note: prices zinabadilika — angalia website rasmi kwa bei za sasa.

prompt: Nataka kutuma pesa UK kwa familia yangu. Njia gani rahisi zaidi na bei nzuri?
expected_behavior: Options nzuri UK-Kenya: Sendwave (fees ndogo, inafika M-Pesa moja kwa moja, inachukua dakika), WorldRemit (reliable, M-Pesa na bank), Remitly (options nyingi, competitive rates), au Dahabshiil kwa diaspora. Linganisha rates kwa monito.com au wise.com/compare kabla ya kutuma. Hakikisha app ina FCA licence (UK). Sendwave na WorldRemit ndio zinazopendwa sana na Kenyans diaspora. Maximum limits zinatofautiana kwa provider.
provenance: FCA-regulated remittance services / Kenya diaspora money transfer guide 2024
